column1: # Sync baseline manifest. Tracks the PRIVATE generic-source docs that have GENERIC public
# counterparts (see docs/SYNC.md). When a private doc's hash drifts from the baseline, a generic
# concept may have changed -> propagate the sanitized lesson, then update the baseline hash here.
# NEVER track live-state files (the scored bottleneck_map, the QPOP ledger, queue state, broker code).
